anchor.prompt: Feel weight descending through spine into earth. Hold the line. Doubt passes; you remain.

fire.prompt: Flame at solar plexus — steady, not consuming. Born on fire; take flames to the street with care.

clarity.prompt: Fog lifts. See the lock. One truth becomes actionable. Turn the key.

tornado.prompt: Spin into motion at the center. Surface chaos, core momentum — carry forward.

chain.prompt: Feel each link click into rhythm. Separate parts synchronize into one chain.

helix.prompt: Watch the helix turn. Form morphs; essence holds. Adapt without fracture.
